support.summary: No CEO action needed at early evaluation stage
support.detail: Perdue Farms is an early multi-vendor RFI in Formal Evaluation (win 42, $613K, close 2027-01-21). There is no blocked discount, roadmap commitment, guaranteed presales, or CEO-to-buyer peer relationship in play. The AE/SE can run the mid-July down-select and any commercial alignment; nothing is irreplaceable to the CEO.
support.why_not_vp: Nothing here is CEO-only; a VP/CRO could handle down-select positioning and any commercial alignment.

monitor.reason: No slip, slowdown, or competitor edge with a signal in the last 14 days; deal is in a deliberate buyer-driven pause.
